subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God and His trusted ones! Now from the clouds of grace there pours forth torrential rain and abundant showers cascade down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله و امنائه قد فاض الان من سحاب الفضل غیث هاطل و ابل منهمر و سالت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
